label: INSIGHTS (section header)
expected_behavior: navSection action calls toggleNavSection('insights'), collapsing/expanding the INSIGHTS nav group and rotating #toggle-insights chevron.
notes: Collapsible group containing the 7 INSIGHTS nav items below.

label: 🏆 Leaderboard
expected_behavior: goTo('board') navigates to the Analytics & Leaderboard SPA view (hydrates tpl-view-board) showing #analyticsContainer + #lbRows rep rankings.
notes: SPA-view (hydrated from <template id='tpl-view-board'>). View body is empty mounts populated by analytics + leaderboard JS.

label: 📈 Reports
expected_behavior: goTo('reports') navigates to the Reports SPA view (tpl-view-reports) with dashboard/trends/ROI/forecast panels + report generator.
notes: SPA-view. Panels render via reports-dashboard.js / reports-trends.js / rep-report-generator.js.

label: 📅 Success Tracker
expected_behavior: windowOpen action calls window.open('/pro/daily-success/', '_blank', 'noopener') — opens the Success Tracker on a SEPARATE PAGE in a new tab.
notes: SEPARATE PAGE (not SPA view). Target /pro/daily-success/ is a standalone app — its internal controls are out of this surface's detail scope.

label: ⛈️ Storm Watch
expected_behavior: goTo('storm') hydrates tpl-view-storm and StormCenter.init() renders the Storm Center (alerts/zones/canvass/analytics tabs) into #stormCenterContainer.
notes: SPA-view. Storm Center markup is injected by storm-center.js (lazy-loaded via ScriptLoader on first nav).

label: 📋 Close Board
expected_behavior: goTo('closeboard') hydrates tpl-view-closeboard and CloseBoard.init() renders shareable deal-room board into #closeBoardContainer.
notes: SPA-view. Board markup injected by close-board.js.

label: 🧠 Rep OS
expected_behavior: goTo('repos') hydrates tpl-view-repos (rep-os SPA view, rendered by rep-os module).
notes: Nav entry recorded for completeness; Rep OS view detail is a separate surface. SPA-view.

label: 🎙️ Talk Tank
expected_behavior: goTo('talk-tank') opens the Talk Tank voice-memo inbox SPA view (talk-tank.js renders into the empty .view-scroll mount).
notes: Nav entry recorded for completeness; Talk Tank view detail is a separate surface. SPA-view.

label: 🤖 Ask Joe AI
expected_behavior: goTo('joe') hydrates tpl-view-joe and (via ai.js goTo wrapper) initJoeChat() runs ~80ms later to render the chat UI / no-key state.
notes: SPA-view. Always-visible Tier-4 system nav item with green AI badge.

label: ⚡ Scenarios
expected_behavior: openDecisionPicker() calls window.DecisionEngine.openPicker() to open the Decision Engine scenario picker (drops a battle-tested prompt into Ask Joe); toasts 'Decision engine loading...' if not yet loaded.
notes: In Ask Joe header. Depends on decision-engine.js being loaded.

label: 🗑️ New Chat
expected_behavior: clearJoeChat() removes JOE_CHAT_STORE from sessionStorage, clears _joeMessages, re-runs initJoeChat(), and toasts 'Chat cleared'.
notes: Clears only chat history, not the API key.

label: API key input (sk-ant-api03-...)
expected_behavior: Password input that holds the Anthropic API key; read by saveJoeKey() on Activate. Value must start with 'sk-ant' or save is rejected.
reveal_state: after:no-API-key (shown only when #joeNoKey active, i.e. Joe not yet activated)
notes: Hidden once a key is saved (display:none on #joeNoKey). Conditional/hidden element.

label: Activate
expected_behavior: saveJoeKey() validates #joeKeyInput starts with 'sk-ant', stores it in sessionStorage (JOE_KEY_STORE), clears the input, runs initJoeChat(), and toasts '✓ Joe AI activated'; error toast on invalid key.
notes: Conditional. Activates the Ask Joe chat. Key stored locally only (sessionStorage).

label: Ask Joe message textarea
expected_behavior: Free-text prompt textarea; on send its value becomes a user message. Enter (no shift) triggers sendJoeMessage via dashboard-ui.js keydown hook.
notes: Conditional — input area hidden (.dn) until Joe is activated.

label: SEND
expected_behavior: sendJoeMessage() appends the user message, builds live pipeline context + system prompt, calls window.callClaude (model claude-haiku-4-5) and appends Joe's reply; disables button while typing.
notes: Sends a request to the Claude API proxy (callClaude Cloud Function). Drive only to the send boundary in testing — incurs an AI/billing call.

label: Quick-prompt chips (📋 Today's priorities, 🎯 Best leads to close, 📄 Supplement request, 💬 Adjuster pushback, 📊 Pipeline summary)
expected_behavior: joeQuick(msg) sets #joeInput to the chip's data-arg text then immediately calls sendJoeMessage() (fires a Claude API call).
notes: 5 chips, REPRESENTATIVE row recorded; each has a distinct data-arg prompt. Conditional. Each click sends to the AI proxy.

label: Change Key
expected_behavior: clearJoeKey() removes the stored API key + chat from session/localStorage, clears _joeMessages, and re-runs initJoeChat() (reverting to the no-key activation state).
notes: Conditional. Inline text link styled as orange clickable span.

label: ✨ Enrich Data
expected_behavior: enrichReportData() calls NBDReports.enrichData() which invokes the backfillAnalytics Cloud Function (reverse-geocode knock GPS to city/zip, derive time-of-day buckets, backfill closedAt); rate-limited 1/user/10min.
notes: Triggers a server-side backfill Cloud Function. One-time analytics enrichment.

label: ＋ New Report
expected_behavior: openReportGenerator() calls NBDReports.openGenerator() which renders the generator UI into #reportGeneratorContainer (template grid + date range + compare/narrative + Generate) and scrolls it into view.
notes: Reveals the report generator panel (elements 020-029).

label: Report template cards (Rep Monthly Review, Territory Deep Dive, Pipeline Health Check, Revenue Recap, Customer Journey)
expected_behavior: selectTemplate(id) sets _selectedTemplate and highlights the chosen card (orange border); the selected template is used by Generate Report.
notes: 5 template cards, REPRESENTATIVE recorded; each has distinct data-nr-id. Customer Journey requires picking a customer. Conditional (in generator panel).

label: Period Start (date)
expected_behavior: Date input for the report range start; read by generateSelected() as rangeStart. Defaults to 30 days ago.
notes: Conditional (generator panel).

label: Period End (date)
expected_behavior: Date input for the report range end; read by generateSelected() as rangeEnd. Defaults to today. generateSelected errors if start > end.
notes: Conditional (generator panel).

label: Quick range presets (Today, Last 7 days, Last 30 days, Last 90 days, Last 12 months, All time)
expected_behavior: setQuickRange(key) recomputes #reportRangeStart/#reportRangeEnd values for the chosen preset window (today/week/month/quarter/year/all).
notes: 6 preset buttons, REPRESENTATIVE recorded; each has distinct data-nr-id. Conditional.

label: Compare Against (select)
expected_behavior: Select for comparison mode (none / vs Prior period / vs Same period last year); read by generateSelected() as compareMode.
notes: Conditional (generator panel).

label: Include Claude-written insights (AI Narrative)
expected_behavior: Checkbox; when checked, generateSelected() passes includeNarrative=true so the report includes a Claude-generated AI narrative (incurs an AI call). Default checked.
notes: Conditional. Enables an AI-narrative API call during report generation.

label: 📈 Generate Report
expected_behavior: generateSelected() reads range/compare/narrative inputs, validates start<=end, then generate(template, opts) computes KPIs and renders the report via NBDDocViewer (Print/PDF/Email/Save); narrative path calls Claude.
notes: Core action of the surface. May trigger an AI narrative call (send-class) when the narrative checkbox is on. Output opens in the Universal Doc Viewer.

label: Open (saved report)
expected_behavior: openSavedReport(id) finds the saved report in window._reports and opens its stored HTML in NBDDocViewer (Print/PDF/Email).
notes: Repeats per saved report; REPRESENTATIVE row. Conditional on saved reports existing.

label: 🗑 (delete saved report)
expected_behavior: deleteSavedReport(id) confirms via window.confirm('Delete this report? This cannot be undone.'), then calls window._deleteReport(id) and re-lists; toasts '✓ Report deleted'.
notes: DANGER: delete. Has a native confirm() gate — drive only to the confirm boundary. Repeats per saved report; REPRESENTATIVE row.

label: 🔄 Refresh Alerts
expected_behavior: StormCenter.refresh() re-fetches NWS/NOAA weather alerts for the user's area and re-renders the alerts tab (shows '⏳ Loading...' while fetching).
notes: Injected by storm-center.js. CSP-safe delegated [data-storm-action] handler on .view-scroll.

label: Storm tabs (📡 Live Alerts, 🗺️ Storm Zones, 🚪 Canvass Plans, 📊 Storm Analytics)
expected_behavior: StormCenter.setTab(id) sets currentTab and re-renders the Storm Center body for the chosen tab (alerts/zones/canvass/analytics).
notes: 4 tabs, REPRESENTATIVE recorded; data-storm-id = alerts/zones/canvass/analytics. Injected.

label: Create Storm Zone
expected_behavior: StormCenter.createZone(alertId) finds the alert and createStormZone(alert) builds a storm canvassing zone from the alert footprint.
notes: Repeats per alert card; REPRESENTATIVE. Conditional on active NWS alerts existing.

label: View / open zone
expected_behavior: StormCenter.openZone(zoneId) sets activeZone, switches to the zones tab, re-renders, and recenters the storm map on the zone.
notes: Repeats per zone (button at :686 and whole card at :877); REPRESENTATIVE. Conditional on storm zones existing.

label: 📋 Plan (generate canvass plan)
expected_behavior: StormCenter.generatePlan(zoneId) builds a door-to-door canvass plan for the zone, switches to the canvass tab, and re-renders.
notes: Repeats per zone; REPRESENTATIVE. Conditional.

label: 🚪 Knock / Start Knocking (push zone to D2D)
expected_behavior: StormCenter.pushToD2D(zoneId) marks the zone status 'canvassing', saves zones, pushes the zone into the D2D tracker, and creates leads from the zone (createLeadsFromZone).
notes: Repeats per zone; REPRESENTATIVE. Writes leads to Firestore (createLeadsFromZone) — verify it creates the expected lead set. Conditional.

label: + NEW DEAL
expected_behavior: CloseBoard.createNew() sets currentTab='create' and re-renders, showing the Create New Deal Room form.
notes: Injected by close-board.js. CSP-safe delegated [data-cb-action] handler. Reveals the create form (elements 037-046).

label: Close Board tabs (📋 Active Deals, ➕ New Deal, 📊 Analytics)
expected_behavior: CloseBoard.setTab(id) sets currentTab and re-renders for the chosen tab (active/create/analytics).
notes: 3 tabs, REPRESENTATIVE recorded; data-cb-id = active/create/analytics. Injected.

label: Customer Name
expected_behavior: Text input read by submitCreateForm() as required customerName; submit errors 'Customer name is required' if blank.
notes: Conditional (create tab). Required field.

label: Phone
expected_behavior: Tel input read as customerPhone; used as the SMS recipient when sending the deal via Text.
notes: Conditional (create tab).

label: Email
expected_behavior: Email input read as customerEmail; used as the recipient when sending the deal via Email.
notes: Conditional (create tab).

label: Address
expected_behavior: Text input read as address on the deal room.
notes: Conditional (create tab).

label: Pricing tiers Good / Better / Best ($)
expected_behavior: Three number inputs read as the good/better/best tier prices; submitCreateForm() errors 'Enter at least one tier price' if all three are 0.
notes: 3 number inputs, REPRESENTATIVE grouped. At least one must be non-zero. Conditional.

label: Insurance claim (checkbox)
expected_behavior: Change handler toggles visibility of #cb-ins-fields (carrier + deductible); checked value stored as insuranceClaim on the deal.
notes: Conditional. Reveals #cb-carrier / #cb-deductible inputs when checked.

label: Insurance carrier / Deductible $
expected_behavior: Carrier (text) + deductible (number) read by submitCreateForm() as insuranceCarrier/deductible when Insurance claim is checked.
notes: Conditional/hidden: revealed only when the Insurance claim checkbox is checked. REPRESENTATIVE grouped (2 inputs).

label: CREATE DEAL ROOM
expected_behavior: submitCreateForm() validates name + at least one tier price, builds tiers (good/better/best), calls createDealRoom(...), toasts success, switches to the active tab and re-renders.
notes: Conditional (create tab). Persists a new deal room (Firestore/localStorage via createDealRoom).

label: 👁 Preview
expected_behavior: CloseBoard.preview(dealId) generates the deal page HTML and opens it in NBDDocViewer (same-origin srcdoc preview with Print/PDF).
notes: Repeats per deal room; REPRESENTATIVE. Conditional on deal rooms existing.

label: 📱 Text
expected_behavior: CloseBoard.sendSMS(dealId) uploads the deal page (if needed), opens an sms: link prefilled with the share URL to the customer phone, and marks the deal status SENT (sentVia 'sms').
notes: DANGER: send (opens SMS to customer + uploads deal page + updates status). Repeats per deal; REPRESENTATIVE. Drive only to the send boundary.

label: 📧 Email
expected_behavior: CloseBoard.sendEmail(dealId) uploads the deal page (if needed), opens a mailto: link prefilled with subject/body + share URL to the customer email, and marks the deal status SENT (sentVia 'email').
notes: DANGER: send (opens email to customer + uploads deal page + updates status). Repeats per deal; REPRESENTATIVE. Drive only to the send boundary.

label: 🔗 Copy
expected_behavior: CloseBoard.copyLink(dealId) copies the deal share URL to clipboard (generating/uploading the deal page first if no URL exists), toasting 'Link copied!'.
notes: Repeats per deal; REPRESENTATIVE. May upload the deal page to Storage as a side effect.

label: Command Palette (Ctrl+K / Cmd+K / '/')
expected_behavior: Global keydown opens NBDCommand.open() — a fuzzy-search overlay over actions/leads/views. Ctrl/Cmd+K toggles; '/' opens when no input is focused; Esc / click-outside closes.
notes: Keyboard-triggered overlay; no clickable launcher button. Modal markup is JS-created.

label: Command palette search input
expected_behavior: On input, re-renders the fuzzy-filtered results list (actions/leads/views); Arrow keys navigate, Enter executes the highlighted item, Esc closes.
notes: Conditional (only inside the open palette). Autofocused on open.

label: Command palette result rows (Navigation/Voice/lead/action entries)
expected_behavior: Clicking (or Enter on) a result calls _execute(item) which runs the action's run() — e.g. navigation rows call _goTo(view), Voice rows open Whisper/Quick Capture, lead rows open the lead.
notes: Many dynamic rows (recents + BUILTIN_ACTIONS + leads); REPRESENTATIVE. Includes go-storm/go-closeboard/go-reports/go-joe nav entries within this surface.

label: Ask Joe (mobile bottom-nav)
expected_behavior: mobileNav('joe') navigates to the Ask Joe view (same as #nav-joe) on mobile.
notes: Mobile bottom-nav duplicate of the Ask Joe nav. Visible only on mobile layout.

label: Mobile More → Insights (Storm Center, Close Board, Leaderboard)
expected_behavior: mobileNav(target) navigates to the respective INSIGHTS view (storm/closeboard/board) and closes the More sheet (data-close-more).
notes: Mobile More-menu duplicates of INSIGHTS nav; REPRESENTATIVE grouped (storm/closeboard/board; Rep OS also present). Conditional on the mobile More sheet being open.
